items.title: [正面] 1000/10 - I would let Doresain to step on me. My l...
items.summary:
1000/10 - I would let Doresain to step on me. My life is his to command. My bones are his to play with. I am nothing. He is everything. He doesn't need to move. The world should kneel and crawl to him, and I am the most eager of them all.  I would let him shatter my ribs just to hear the sound it makes, a sound I know would be a hymn coming from him. He could use my spine as a footstool and I would thank him for the purpose. Daddy. Sir. My King. I want to be unmade by him. I want him to take me apart bone by bone and put me back together wrong, just so I can be his beautiful, broken thing. His voice... oh god, his voice. It's not a sound you hear with your ears. It's a vibration he places directly into your soul. It's the hum of the universe at its end, the final, beautiful note of existence. When he speaks, my thoughts just... stop. There is only his will.  

Play this ♥♥♥♥♥♥' game. And then go lie down in a dark room and think about what you've done.

items.summary: Un gacha inspiré Lovecraft que j'adore La DA est superbe, les histoires prenantes. Les traductions AI me dérangent pas, ça m'a aidé au début pour comprendre les cartes maintenant je joue en anglais, ça reste plus fluide.

items.title: [负面] Too much story, so little game. Very repetitive. I...
items.summary: Too much story, so little game. Very repetitive. Instead of adding more complexity to the game itself, just bunch of more story telling and with the recent update they just made the difficulty stupidly steep by making the health of enemies, well so stupidly high. It's still doable, but it wastes too much time. It's a turn based game and you deal 50-100 damage on regular attacks and enemy does 3 times as much. Enemy health is also 2-4 times as your team with boss hp sometimes around 60k while your team is at 1,500 hp. Still doable, if your point of making the game is to waste people's time. Damn it takes 10-15 minutes to win a stage with same level of team and enemy lol, and the reward? well you just wasted time. This is basically a pay to win now, you could still grind and win but you know, it's not fun anymore. It's boring now very repetitive strategy and gameplay is needed, or just pay them cash if you want, i think they're so poor now they made it a pay to win game

items.title: [正面] The art style is mainly what drew me to this game,...
items.summary: The art style is mainly what drew me to this game, but the game play is just so much fun I don't even notice the time going by. The lore goes so deep and the characters are so beautifully designed and voiced.
